prompt: Add a slugify(text) function to src/format.js and re-export it from src/index.js. slugify must: lowercase the input, trim it, replace runs of whitespace with a single hyphen, strip every character other than a-z, 0-9, and hyphens, collapse repeated hyphens into one, and trim leading/trailing hyphens. Example: '  Hello,  World!  ' becomes 'hello-world'. Existing exports must keep working.
